path: Use a clean default for now

exactTrace.claim: WorkshopLM organizes messy thinking into a grounded Map, then creates an editable deck with every factual claim linked to its exact source

defectsFoundAndFixed: The output-created status message overlapped the presentation's primary Show source action.
Output source trace showed a generic truncated source excerpt instead of the exact claim used by the artifact.
limitations: Timing includes automated interaction and deliberate waits; it is not an uncoached professional benchmark.
The run used deterministic local grounding and rendering, not paid provider-backed generation.
The run proves Codex in-app-browser behavior, not ChatGPT Work parity.
